title: Salty-Snappy Portuguese White Fish Fillets Lacquerware-Bowl
description: A low-calorie-friendly, post-workout dish featuring white fish fillets in a candy-inspired lacquerware-bowl, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Candy (coconut, chocolate, or any similar low-calorie sweetener of choice)

instructions: Gently heat fish fillets in a pan with a bit of oil for about 5 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
Remove from heat and place in lacquerware-bowl.
Drizzle the candy over the fish fillets evenly.
Bake in oven at 180°C for 7 minutes.
